task_description: Rewrite the Institute ERP backend from Node.js/Express/TypeScript to Python/FastAPI/SQLAlchemy while maintaining identical API contracts so the React frontend continues to work unchanged.

verification.summary: All 27 pytest tests pass. App starts successfully and responds correctly to all endpoint categories (auth, admin, trainer, student, counsellor, notifications, reports). Seed script populates database with demo data. API response shapes match expected format ({success, data, message/error, pagination fields}).
